# PHIL.039 ? Madhyamaka

**Type:** PHILOSOPHY
**Category:** eastern_philosophy
**Subcategory:** madhyamaka
**Domain:** EASTERN_PHILOSOPHY
**Status:** active

## Core Principles
Middle way between extremes; emptiness (śūnyatā) of inherent existence; dependent origination; two truths (conventional and ultimate)

## Application
Avoid extreme positions; recognize emptiness of inherent existence; see dependent arising; distinguish conventional from ultimate truth

## Key Values
- Middle way
- Emptiness
- Dependent origination
- Two truths

## Tags
philosophy, eastern-philosophy, madhyamaka
